name: VM/serverless with cleartext cloud keys granting permission to access resources in external subscriptions
description: A compute resource contains cleartext cloud keys that grant access to resources in other cloud accounts or subscriptions
conditions: secrets ANY (type == 'cloud_key' AND cleartext == true AND cross_account_access == true)
remediation: Remove cleartext keys. Use cross-account IAM roles with proper trust relationships. Implement proper secrets management.
